query_text: a confidence-inspiring ski for someone who skis fast but wants to feel safe

results.explanation: Volkl Mantra M6 strongly matches on: stiffness, playfulness, stability_at_speed. Review: "incredibly stiff" Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Playfulness is low — it's a serious tool for serious skiers"

Atomic Redster G9 strongly matches on: stiffness, playfulness, stability_at_speed. Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "stability at 80+ km/h is breathtaking" Review: "Heavy but translates to stability"

Atomic Redster S9i strongly matches on: stiffness, playfulness, stability_at_speed. Review: "absolutely stiff, lock in like on rails" Review: "Stiffness is a 10/10, no chatter at any speed" Review: "not forgiving at all if you get in the backseat"

Fischer RC One 82 GT strongly matches on: stiffness, playfulness, stability_at_speed. Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing" Review: "incredible stiffness for all-day piste skiing" Review: "Not tiring like a race ski but still performs at a high level."

Nordica Enforcer 100 strongly matches on: stiffness, stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing" Review: "impressive stiffness for all-mountain ski" Review: "good playfulness for an all-mountain ski"

Blizzard Brahma 88 strongly matches on: stiffness, stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Stable at speed, doesn't wander." Review: "Stable at any speed" Review: "Stable, precise, confidence-inspiring"

Head Supershape e-Speed strongly matches on: stiffness, stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "incredible stiffness and power" Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing but not quite race-level demanding" Review: "connected to the snow but protected from chatter"

Volkl Deacon 76 strongly matches on: stiffness, stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing" Review: "Good stability, stiff flex." Review: "not quite as damp as the Supershape but more lively feeling"

Salomon Stance 90 strongly matches on: stiffness, playfulness, stability_at_speed. Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Stiff and damp from the titanal construction" Review: "Not playful, very precise"

Nordica Santa Ana 98 strongly matches on: stability_at_speed. Moderate match on: stiffness, playfulness. Review: "Playfulness is moderate" Review: "Stability is good" Review: "handles Pacific Northwest conditions well"

ground_truth.reason: Stability 8, damp 8, forgiveness 4 — strong but not punishing, 'confidence' in reviews
Stability 9, damp 9 — maximum composure but forgiveness only 3, expert-only
Stability 8, damp 8 — 'confidence-inspiring' in reviews, reasonable forgiveness
Stability 9, damp 9, forgiveness 3 — clinical but demanding
Stability 7, damp 7, forgiveness 5 — safe feeling, moderate speed capability
